cardTitle: Quilted Neoprene Makeup Bag with Custom Logo
logo: Printing (silk screen/heat transfer/hot stamping), embroidery, woven label, PU leather patch, silicone rubber patch, metal plate
application: Travel, Daily Makeup Storage, Beauty Organization, Toiletry Storage, Promotional Gifts, Retail Sales, Brand Merchandise
title: Quilted Neoprene Makeup Bag Custom Embossed Logo Waterproof Travel Cosmetic Pouch for Women
seoTitle: Custom Embossed Logo Neoprene Makeup Bag Wholesale Quilted Travel Cosmetic Pouch | YourBrand
description:
Soft Waterproof Neoprene Material
Crafted from thick, flexible neoprene (diving fabric), our makeup pouch features water-resistant surface to prevent liquid spills from ruining your cosmetics. The smooth padded quilted texture offers extra protection for fragile makeup compacts and glass bottles, while the soft fabric is foldable to save space in your luggage or handbag.
Custom Embossed Logo Option
Stand out with personalized branding! We support custom embossed logo on the front of the neoprene makeup bag, subtle and high-end without fading or peeling. Ideal for personal unique styling, bridal gifts, girls’ trip accessories and small beauty brand merchandise.
Large Capacity & Easy Care
Spacious interior fits full-size makeup sets, skincare bottles and beauty tools. The smooth zipper design allows quick access to your items. Best of all, this neoprene cosmetic bag is fully machine washable — simply toss it in water to remove makeup stains, no complicated maintenance required.
Multi-Scenario Travel Companion
This versatile neoprene toiletry bag works as daily makeup organizer, flight travel wash bag, gym shower pouch, weekend vacation cosmetic case and bridesmaid gift. Minimalist neutral color palette matches all outfits and luggage designs.
seoDescription: Quilted neoprene makeup bag with custom embossed logo, waterproof & washable travel cosmetic pouch for women. Soft padded large capacity toiletry bag for daily, flight & vacation use, 3 neutral colors available. Shop now!
